emptySectionMessage: No new reportable events for today's briefing.
searchWindow: Search for new developments from the last 24 hours first. If a section has fewer than five strong items, expand to the last seven days. Do not include weak or unrelated filler.

sections.title: Healthcare Workplace Violence
sections.subtitle: Patients, visitors, employees · ED, behavioral health, nursing homes, home health
sections.focus: Workplace violence in healthcare settings involving visitors, patients, employees, clinical staff, security staff, emergency departments, behavioral health, nursing homes, home health, and hospital campuses.

sections.title: HIPAA / Privacy Enforcement
sections.subtitle: Rule changes · OCR cases · settlements · state health privacy laws
sections.focus: HIPAA rule changes, HHS OCR enforcement, health privacy settlements, healthcare data privacy lawsuits, state privacy laws affecting health information, and major healthcare privacy cases.

sections.title: Healthcare Violence Law & Regulation
sections.subtitle: OSHA activity · lawsuits · bills · staffing/security mandates · union actions
sections.focus: Regulatory, legal, legislative, lawsuit, OSHA, state agency, staffing, security mandate, union, and compliance developments tied to workplace violence prevention in healthcare.

sections.title: Healthcare & University Security Guard Industry
sections.subtitle: Staffing · licensing · training · de-escalation · use of force · contract trends
sections.focus: Security guard industry developments for healthcare and universities, including contracting, licensing, pay, training, de-escalation, use-of-force policy, staffing shortages, campus safety, and hospital security operations.

sections.title: Security Best Practices & Trends
sections.subtitle: Visitor management · weapons screening · panic buttons · body cameras · AI video analytics
sections.focus: Best practices and hot topics in healthcare and university security, including visitor management, weapons detection, duress alerts, panic buttons, body cameras, video analytics, reporting, training, and security technology governance.

sections.title: Human Trafficking Intelligence
sections.subtitle: US focus · sex & labor trafficking · healthcare, universities, hotels, cases, laws, findings
sections.focus: Human trafficking intelligence with U.S. focus and major international items only when relevant to U.S. enforcement, policy, travel, supply chains, or investigations. Cover sex trafficking and labor trafficking, criminal cases, civil lawsuits, legislation, task force findings, hotels and hospitality, healthcare victim identification, university/campus activity, and investigator best practices.
